findings.title: Review-command migration omits helper paths that still require changeDir
findings.detail: The design assumes the review bins can be migrated by instantiating ChangeArtifactStore in main() and swapping a few read/write calls, but the current review commands still depend on helper APIs that take a changeDir and do change-artifact path/I/O internally (for example readLedger, backupAndWriteLedger, renderCurrentPhase, readDesignArtifacts, resetLedger, and the autofix fileHash(resolve(changeDir, ...)) paths). Without explicitly refactoring those helpers to accept ChangeArtifactStore/artifact refs, or adding store-backed wrappers for every review/fix-review/autofix/reset path, the bins cannot actually remove resolve(..., "openspec/changes", ...) and direct change-artifact access as required. Update the design and tasks to cover those helper-layer changes before implementation starts.

findings.title: Behavior-sensitive flows are not explicitly verified
findings.detail: The proposal requires no observable behavior change, and the design itself calls out regression risk around prepare-change scaffold detection and review-ledger backup behavior. The task list only adds unit tests for listChanges/changeExists plus generic bun test/typecheck/lint runs, which does not prove the refactor preserved the two-step prepare-change flow (existing change dir with missing or empty proposal) or review ledger reset/overwrite behavior. Add targeted tests or integration checks for those paths so the migration can be validated without manual rework.
